title: Open the Visu_Dual_MCP screen and stop the automatic tipping cycle for manual axis positioning
summary: Source-specific preparation procedure for maintenance-related manual axis positioning. On the operator station HMI, navigate to the Visu_Dual_MCP screen using F3 and press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle before any further manual positioning actions.
when_to_use: Use when preparing the operator station for maintenance procedures that require the end effector to be manually moved into position using the HMI.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a complete manual referencing procedure; the source packet only supports the setup steps.
Do not continue into manual movement or referencing actions unless additional source-backed instructions are available.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate to the Visu_Dual_MCP screen and stop the automatic tipping cycle as preparation for maintenance positioning.

safety_notes: This source only supports preparation steps for maintenance positioning.
Stop after CYCLE STOP unless additional source-backed instructions are available for the intended maintenance task.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: The operator station HMI is available for navigation.
The procedure is being performed in support of a maintenance procedure requiring manual end effector positioning.

visual_references.description: Operator station HMI artifact from the manually referencing axes section showing the screen context for navigating to Visu_Dual_MCP and pressing CYCLE STOP.
Operator station HMI artifact associated with manually referencing tipper axes during maintenance.
Operator station control panel figure showing CYCLE STOP and related operator controls.

steps.title: Open the Visu_Dual_MCP screen
steps.purpose: Access the HMI screen used for maintenance-related manual positioning actions.
steps.instruction: On the operator station HMI, navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen using F3.
steps.expected_result: The Visu_Dual_MCP screen is displayed on the operator station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station HMI shows the Visu_Dual_MCP screen needed for the maintenance positioning setup.
steps.failure_condition: The Visu_Dual_MCP screen cannot be reached or the expected operator station screen is not displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The operator station HMI context for the manually referencing axes procedure and the Visu_Dual_MCP navigation reference.
The operator station screen associated with manually referencing tipper axes during maintenance.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Visu_Dual_MCP screen cannot be opened from the operator station HMI.
The displayed screen does not match the expected maintenance positioning context.

source_evidence.text: On the operator station HMI, navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen (F3).
The procedure instructs the user to navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen using F3 and press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.
The operator is instructed to navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen using F3 and press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Artifact appears on page 103 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_7_3_1_2_manually_referencing_axes.

steps.title: Stop the automatic tipping cycle
steps.purpose: Place the operator station in the stopped state required before further manual maintenance positioning actions.
steps.instruction: Press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.
steps.expected_result: The automatic tipping cycle is stopped.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station is no longer in the automatic tipping cycle and is prepared for the next maintenance-specific manual positioning instructions.
steps.failure_condition: The automatic tipping cycle does not stop after pressing CYCLE STOP.

actions.label: Press CYCLE STOP
actions.exact_action: Press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The operator station HMI context associated with pressing CYCLE STOP in the manually referencing axes procedure.
The CYCLE STOP control on the operator station control panel.

stop_or_escalate_if: CYCLE STOP is not available on the displayed HMI screen.
The automatic tipping cycle does not stop.
Additional manual movement steps are needed but are not available from this source-backed procedure.

source_evidence.text: Press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.

success_criteria: The Visu_Dual_MCP screen is open on the operator station HMI.
The automatic tipping cycle is stopped.
The operator station is prepared for subsequent maintenance-specific manual positioning instructions, if separately available.
healthy_conditions: The correct operator station HMI screen is displayed.
CYCLE STOP is successfully used to stop the automatic tipping cycle.
failure_conditions: The Visu_Dual_MCP screen cannot be accessed.
The automatic tipping cycle does not stop.
The procedure requires additional manual movement or referencing steps that are not provided in this source.
escalation_guidance: Stop after CYCLE STOP if the next required maintenance positioning steps are not available from an approved source-backed procedure.
Escalate for SME review if the Visu_Dual_MCP screen cannot be reached or if CYCLE STOP does not stop the automatic tipping cycle.
Escalate when full manual referencing or movement instructions are required, because this source packet is incomplete for those actions.
